headline: How Amex’s Dividend Hike And Digital Push At American Express (AXP) Has Changed Its Investment Story
summary: In recent weeks, American Express has reported strong business momentum for 2026, raised its quarterly dividend by 16%, expanded stadium and regional partnerships, and deepened its corporate offering by integrating virtual cards into SAP Concur’s expense platform. These moves highlight how American Express is using higher card fees, richer perks, and digital integrations to reinforce its premium brand while returning more capital to shareholders. headline: BrightQuery Becomes Gold Member of FINOS, the Fintech Open Source Foundation, and Joins Governing Board
summary: BrightQuery strengthens its commitment to open data, financial technology standards, and collaborative innovation through leadership within the Linux Foundation ecosystem.Irvine, CA, March 19, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- BrightQuery today announced that it has joined the Fintech Open Source Foundation (FINOS) as a Gold Member.
